items.html: And know that this Zivug [coupling], which we say took place in AA [Arich Anpin] for the need of the first Ibur [conception] of ZA [Zeir Anpin], divides into two Zivugim: the first is called the upper Zivug, in the secret of kisses [Neshikin], and the second is called the lower Zivug, in the secret of the Yesod; and the discernments of these two kinds of Zivugim have already been explained. Thus, first AA coupled for this Ibur in the upper Zivug of kisses, and from there the drop of that upper Zivug was drawn down to the Yesod in him, and there the second, lower Zivug was made; and from there that drop went out again and was drawn into AVI [Aba ve Ima], and they too coupled and extended them to ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva]; and then it remained, in the secret of Ibur, in the belly of Ima.
